chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 835 of 2022 Date order with Signature of Hon’ble Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on CMA No.3078/2022 (Ex.A) 2. For hearing of main case 25.04.2024 Mr. Noor Ahmed Chadhar, Advocate for the Petitioner Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Naich, Assistant Advocate General Sindh along with Dilyawar Soomro, Assistant Education Officer, Focal Person on behalf of District Education Officer (Primary) Ghotki >>>>>..<<<<< Comments have been filed on behalf of Respondent No.3/District Education Officer (Primary) Ghotki, which are taken on record; a copy thereof is provided to learned counsel for the petitioner, in which it has been submitted that they are ready to offer the post of Watchman/Chowkidar or Peon (BPS-01) to the petitioner for his appointment on deceased quota. Learned counsel for the petitioner has accepted the offer. Accordingly, this petition is disposed of in the above terms along with listed application. Compliance be made and report shall be submitted for a perusal in chamber within two months hereof. Judge Judge ARBROHI
